title: ヒヤシンスSの後に・勝者の影に

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And... I saw it—the brilliant sparkle of
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought their zeal for running is what made them
precious. But now I believe the feelings they have
toward racing...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Are much, much more serious and profound! I
have no doubt that's why Doto dazzled the way
she did!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mustn't disturb that brilliance, but I do want to
celebrate it!
Ngh... Sniffle...
Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? That voice... That's one of the other racers...

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I didn't make it... onto the scoreboard... Will I
even make it... in the other graded races? I... I...
Waaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Defeated Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Pull yourself together! Stand proud! You might
have lost today, but didn't you give it your all?

text_block_list.name: Defeated Trainer
text_block_list.text:
All we learned today is that those who finished
ahead of us worked harder.

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Nnnngh...

text_block_list.name: Defeated Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I know we haven't won a race yet, and it hurts to
keep losing like this... but the Twinkle Series isn't
over yet!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Someday, you'll run in a G1 and you'll show
everyone. Now, are you ready for the winning
concert?

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You're right! Okay, I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost again, but this isn't over! There's
always tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm so full of it...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I said I want to admire my oshis without disturbing
them, but.... it's impossible...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Each race has to have a winner, which means
there have to be losers as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No one wants to see their oshis lose. Even a baby would know better than that, and yet, I...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I decided to run in races myself, I've
had an influence on the outcome... I can't say I'm
just a spectator anymore...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: My actions... affect other Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think today's race has sparked a change in
Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I'd like to talk about the future. It's
going to sound a bit out of character, but will you
hear me out?
choice_data_list: Is it about our race schedule?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes. I want to run in a G1 race, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I think what I did to that other runner earlier was
borderline unforgivable.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Because of that, I want to run in a G1 race. I want
to run and make her think, "Wow! Agnes Digital
sure was strong!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And while I'm at it... I want to learn firsthand what
level of effort the others are putting in to take on
G1 races!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, which race do you think I'm best suited for?
Gimme your best recommendation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mentally collate which G1 races both admit
classic-year runners and are a suitable distance
for Agnes Digital...
choice_data_list: I think the NHK Mile Cup is the best fit.
I think the NHK Mile Cup is the best fit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The NHK Mile Cup! If that's your fantastic recommendation, then it must be right. I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: For her sake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A kind of winner's remorse has come over Agnes
Digital, but it's given her the drive to push ahead.
